dataset: IPCC AR6 Global Warming Potential Factors

pi_items.source: Task specification - custom method name for AR6 updated version
IPCC AR6 WG1 Chapter 7 - GWP100 for fossil methane (fugitive and process)
IPCC AR6 WG1 Chapter 7 - GWP100 for nitrous oxide (100-year timeframe)
Verification tolerance parameter - reasonable for GWP factor comparison
Task setup script creates this directory at line 47 of setup_task.sh

pi_items.metadata_value: TRACI 2.1 is a real LCIA method
pi_items.verified_value: TRACI 2.1 released by US EPA in 2012 with global warming as one of 10 impact categories
pi_items.source: US EPA TRACI documentation and Earthster Knowledge Base

pi_items.verified_value: IPCC AR6 (2021) officially establishes methane GWP100=29.8 (fossil) and N2O GWP100=273
pi_items.source: IPCC AR6 Working Group I Chapter 7 and GHG Management Institute documentation

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real, authoritative data from IPCC AR6 (2021). The target methane value of 29.8 is the official IPCC AR6 GWP100 for fossil methane (fugitive and process sources), representing an increase from the oxidation-adjusted value of 27.9. The target N2O value of 273 is the official IPCC AR6 GWP100 for nitrous oxide over 100 years. TRACI 2.1 is a genuine LCIA method developed by US EPA (2012) that includes a global warming impact category with characterization factors in kg CO2e. The task involves updating a copy of TRACI 2.1 with these newer IPCC AR6 values, renaming it to 'TRACI 2.1 (IPCC AR6 Modified)'. All metadata values are consistent with authoritative sources.
